overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a nighttime urban environment. The scene features wet streets reflecting city lights, autumn foliage, and a mix of modern glass skyscrapers and older brick buildings with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway adjacent to commercial building entrance

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along a paved walkway next to a building with large windows and neon signage

entered.detail: Building facade with large circular illuminated sign above entrance
Park bench situated against the building wall
Tall vertical windows with closed blinds
Patterned stone tiles with wet reflective surface
Rectangular planter containing trees and bushes
Ornate metal railing running along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a covered walkway next to a commercial building at night. The area features benches, decorative planters with trees, and a metal fence, with wet stone pavement reflecting the building's lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with view of iconic skyscraper

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street intersection revealing tall illuminated skyscraper ahead
crossing the street at a marked crosswalk with traffic lights visible

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking across the street intersection toward the tall glass skyscraper while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person standing on sidewalk corner looking at phone
white sedan stopped at the intersection waiting at traffic light

entered.detail: Concrete traffic bollards marking the edge of the pedestrian area
Dark asphalt street surface with white lane markings
Illuminated modern glass tower with distinctive architectural lighting
Yellow traffic signal housing showing red light
Building with red neon 'PIZZA' sign visible in the distance
Multi-story brick building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with a prominent glass skyscraper towering in the distance. Spider-Man crosses the asphalt street among other pedestrians while a white car waits at the traffic light, and a pizza restaurant becomes visible down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with pizza restaurant and red awning

events.description: arrives at sidewalk next to pizza restaurant with illuminated red awning and neon signage

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the concrete sidewalk past the pizza shop and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: woman walking in opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: Dark colored sedan parked along the curb
Gray concrete pavement with scattered autumn leaves
Tree with autumn foliage growing through sidewalk cutout
Red brick building front with illuminated ground floor

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along the sidewalk passing the pizza restaurant with its bright red awning and neon signage. Parked cars line the street, autumn leaves scatter the concrete, and pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with wet reflective asphalt

events.description: begins crossing the street at the next intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the wet asphalt street and continuing down the road

entered.detail: White striped pedestrian crossing on dark wet road
City skyline with various lit windows and streetlights

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses the wet asphalt street at another intersection, leaving the pizza restaurant behind. The road surface reflects the city lights, and the view opens up to the distant illuminated buildings of the downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered commercial walkway into the open, neon-lit expanse of a rainy downtown district. It begins beside a building's covered path, moving past benches and decorative planters over wet stone pavement that reflects the overhead lights. As the path ends, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the camera follows Spider-Man across the asphalt toward a towering glass skyscraper and a distant pizza restaurant. The movement then shifts along the sidewalk, passing the restaurant's bright red awning and neon signs amidst scattered autumn leaves and passing pedestrians. Finally, the camera crosses another wet intersection, leaving the storefronts behind as the view expands to reveal the illuminated skyline of the downtown area.
